mapper.select: SELECT pd.*, m.medicine_name, m.medicine_spec, m.package_unit FROM prescription_detail pd LEFT JOIN medicine m ON pd.medicine_id = m.medicine_id WHERE pd.pres_id = #{presId} ORDER BY pd.detail_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prescription_detail (pres_id, medicine_id, quantity, price, amount, usage_method, dosage) VALUES (#{presId}, #{medicineId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{amount}, #{usageMethod}, #{dosage})

INSERT INTO prescription_detail (pres_id, medicine_id, quantity, price, amount, usage_method, dosage) VALUES
(#{d.presId}, #{d.medicineId}, #{d.quantity}, #{d.price}, #{d.amount}, #{d.usageMethod}, #{d.dosage})
